onboarding.title: Welcome to SeaCheck
onboarding.disclaimerBody: SeaCheck is not a certified chart plotter. Always carry official charts and verify critical navigational information. Map and seamark data may be incomplete or outdated.
onboarding.locationBody: SeaCheck needs your GPS position to show you on the chart and display COG, SOG, and bearing.
onboarding.locationForeground: Allow location while using the app
onboarding.locationBackground: Allow background location for track recording
onboarding.batteryBody: On Android, battery savers often stop GPS updates at sea. Disable battery optimization for SeaCheck and allow background location if you record tracks.
onboarding.downloadReminder: On Wi‑Fi, open Downloads and save the Kieler Bucht pack — charts work offline at sea.

settings.title: Settings
settings.defaultsSummary: Cruise/passage · knots · NM · true° · DDM · course-up
settings.batteryBody: Keep SeaCheck exempt from battery optimization on Android so GPS and track recording stay reliable underway.
settings.locationDenied: Location: denied — enable in system settings
settings.alarmsBody: Sound and vibration for anchor drag, arrival, and off-course alerts.
settings.disclaimerBody: SeaCheck is an aid to navigation only. Not for primary navigation. Always verify with official charts.

map.copyCoordsHint: Copies the current position to the clipboard
map.downloadHint: Download a region pack on Wi‑Fi before going offshore — charts work offline once saved.
map.offlineNoTiles: No offline charts for this area. Connect to Wi‑Fi and download a pack.
map.mobHoldHint: Hold for two seconds to drop a MOB mark at your current position
map.mobDroppedBody: Navigate back using bearing and distance. MOB appears on map and in waypoints.
map.mobNoGpsBody: Wait for a GPS fix before dropping a MOB mark.
map.anchorSetBody: Alert if you drift more than %{nm} NM from this position.
map.anchorNoGpsBody: Wait for a GPS fix to set the anchor alarm at your current position.

race.startLineBody: Pick two saved waypoints as the pin ends — the line appears on the map.
race.startLineNeedWaypoints: Save at least two waypoints first (long-press the map).
race.startLinePickBoth: Select pin A and pin B to draw the start line.

alarms.legAdvanceBody: Arrived at %{name}. Advance to the next leg?

downloads.title: Offline charts
downloads.subtitle: Download base map + OpenSeaMap seamarks for use without signal.
downloads.wifiNote: Use Wi‑Fi for large packs. Kieler Bucht is a small test pack (~few MB).
downloads.customBody: Draw a rectangle on the map or use a quick download around your GPS position. Use Wi‑Fi for large areas.
downloads.customAwaitingGps: Open the map tab and wait for GPS to estimate a custom download area.
downloads.customNoGpsBody: A GPS fix is needed to centre the custom download rectangle.
downloads.customMapLead: Pan and zoom the chart, then tap two opposite corners of the area you need.
downloads.customMapBanner: Tap two opposite corners of your sailing area
downloads.customStepOne: Step 1 — tap the first corner on the map
downloads.customStepConfirm: Review size and confirm download on Wi‑Fi
downloads.customCornerFirst: First corner set — tap the opposite corner

customInvalid.too_small: Area is too small — zoom in or tap corners farther apart.
customInvalid.too_large: Area is too large — select a smaller rectangle.
customInvalid.too_many_tiles: Too many map tiles — reduce area or lower max zoom.

downloads.customStartedBody: Return to Downloads to watch progress. Stay on Wi‑Fi until complete.

kielBay.name: Kieler Bucht (test)
kielBay.description: Small pack for dockside and on-water UAT around Kiel.

balticWest.name: Kattegat & Danish Straits
balticWest.description: Skagen to Copenhagen, Øresund, Great Belt, Bornholm approaches.

balticSouth.name: German Baltic coast
balticSouth.description: Flensburg to Rügen, Fehmarn, Szczecin lagoon approach.

balticSouthSe.name: Southern Sweden
balticSouthSe.description: Malmö to Karlskrona, Kalmar, Öland west coast.

waypoints.subtitle: Saved marks and harbours
waypoints.emptyBody: Long-press the map to drop a waypoint, or add a sample mark to get started.
waypoints.tapGoTo: Tap a waypoint to go-to · long-press to delete

tracks.subtitle: Record your route and export GPX
tracks.emptyBody: Start recording while underway. Points are saved every few seconds with GPS.
tracks.locationRequiredBody: Allow location access to record a track.
tracks.backgroundNotificationBody: Recording your route — GPS active in background
tracks.recordingBackground: Background GPS active (10 s moving / 60 s at anchor)
tracks.backgroundDeniedBody: Track will record only while SeaCheck is open. Enable “Always” in system settings for passage logging with screen off.

passage.subtitle: Plan legs before departure
passage.emptyBody: Create a passage and add at least two waypoints for leg bearings and ETAs.
passage.needTwoWaypoints: Add at least two waypoints to this passage.
passage.total: Total: %{nm} NM · %{hours} h at planned SOG
passage.waypointsBody: Waypoints are visited in order. Add saved marks from your library.
passage.waypointsEmpty: No waypoints in this passage yet.
passage.noMoreWaypoints: All saved waypoints are already in this passage — long-press the map to create more.
passage.offlineCheckBody: Checks whether downloaded packs cover each leg (with 0.5 NM buffer). Download gaps before departure.
passage.offlineNoPacks: No offline packs ready — download charts first
passage.departureUnset: Not set — ETAs hidden until departure is set
passage.departureHint: Use “Depart now” before leaving to calculate ETAs from your current time.
passage.editorBody: Review bearings, distances, and ETAs. Green legs are covered offline; red legs need charts.
passage.legNotePlaceholder: Optional note (e.g. stay east of shoal)
